items.title: 'You always have regrets' - Rooney on managerial career
items.summary: Former Manchester United and England striker Wayne Rooney says he harbours regrets about his managerial career and cannot see himself making a return to the dugout.

items.title: Can 'familiar face' Maresca carry on Guardiola's work at Man City?
items.summary: One of Pep Guardiola's more memorable quotes from his time as Manchester City boss is "we cannot replace him." It was 2021 and a tearful Guardiola was talking about Sergio Aguero - but now it is himself who is being replaced as head coach.

items.summary: Manchester United have acquired "the majority" of land needed to build a proposed new 100,000-seater stadium, the club announced on Monday.

items.title: Draper wins opening match at Eastbourne under new coach Murray
items.summary: Jack Draper beat lucky loser Marcos Giron 6-4 7-6 (7-5) in an impressive straight sets first-round victory at the Eastbourne Open in his first game under new coach Andy Murray.
